title: 🧪 Comparison Sort - Insertion Sort Implementation
content:
```python
## function definition
def insertionSort(arr):
    for i in range(1, len(arr)):
        key = arr[i]
        j = i - 1
        
        while j >= 0 and key < arr[j]:
            arr[j+1] = arr[j]
            j = j - 1
        
        arr[j+1] = key
    return arr

## Driver code
arr = [9, 5, 1, 4, 3]
## function calling
result = insertionSort(arr)
print("Sorted array after applying the insertion sort is", result)
```
